case_title: WERSHKOFF, EUGENE ARCHIE VS TANNER, FRANKLIN MONROE @DOCKTOWN MARINA (SLIP#63) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WERSHKOFF, EUGENE ARCHIE AS TO DEFENDANT TANNER, FRANKLIN MONROE @DOCKTOWN MARINA (SLIP#63) CHAMBERS, JOHN   @ DOCKTOWN MARINA (SLIP #18) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TANNER, FRANKLIN MONROE @DOCKTOWN MARINA (SLIP#63) CHAMBERS, JOHN   @ DOCKTOWN MARINA (SLIP #18) VENUE CHALLENGE GRANTED.
